title: coaching knowledge phase 1 implementation plan
description:
## Summary

Implementation plan for **Phase 1** of the coaching knowledge pipeline (spec: PR #633).

- 12 TDD tasks covering DB migration → PDF/EPUB extraction → ingest CLI → CRUD module → 3 API endpoint groups → 2 Astro pages → 1 Svelte component (BookReader with highlighting) → Playwright E2E.
- New `coaching` Postgres schema with `books`, `snippets`, `snippet_clusters`. Reuses existing `knowledge.collections/documents/chunks` for chunked + embedded text.
- Admin UI under `/admin/knowledge/books/*` mirrors the existing `/admin/wissensquellen` patterns.
- **No AI drafting in Phase 1** — Phases 2 (Publish-Cascade), 3 (AI-Drafting), 4 (Session-Prep), 5 (In-Session-RAG) get their own plans afterwards.

## Test plan

- [ ] Plan reviewed for placeholder-free TDD tasks (done in self-review)
- [ ] Execution via `superpowers:subagent-driven-development` after merge
- [ ] Each task ends with a working commit; CI green between tasks
